subcodes.first_line: From the horizon of destiny hath shone forth a Sun, whereon hath been inscribed by the Most Glorious Pen: "The Prison is for the Dawning-Place of Lights." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرقت من افق القضاء شمس رقم علیها من القلم الابهی السجن لمطلع الانوار انا
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
